name: midscene-task-platform
description: 这是 Sonic + Task + 千问 + Midscene 的独立工程目录。

scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:visual
scripts.test:static: python3 -m py_compile midscene-upload.py $(find task_server -name '*.py' -print) tests/backend_static_checks.py tests/frontend_static_checks.py tests/ai_gateway_static_checks.py tests/api_case_contract_checks.py tests/undefined_name_checks.py && python3 tests/undefined_name_checks.py && python3 tests/backend_static_checks.py && python3 tests/frontend_static_checks.py && python3 tests/ai_gateway_static_checks.py && python3 tests/api_case_contract_checks.py && node tests/ai_gateway_catalog_checks.mjs && python3 ai_skills/evals/run_skill_evals.py
